params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Sort order for pipelines (e.g., name asc, createdDate desc)

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of pipelines to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results returned by a previous call

items.docs: Returns a list of pipeline definitions in the project. Pipelines are YAML-based CI/CD definitions stored in source repositories. Supports ordering and pagination through query parameters.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

items.docs: Creates a new pipeline definition in the project. The pipeline references a YAML file in a source repository. After creation the pipeline can be triggered manually or automatically by code changes, schedules, or other pipeline completions.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

params.name: pipelineVersion
params.description: Specific version of the pipeline definition to retrieve

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific pipeline definition including its configuration, repository source, folder path, and revision number. Optionally retrieves a specific version of the pipeline definition.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

items.docs: Returns a list of runs (executions) for a specific pipeline. Each run represents a single execution of the pipeline with its state, result, timing, and the resources and template parameters used. Returns up to 10000 runs and supports pagination.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

params.name: pipelineVersion
params.description: Specific version of the pipeline to run

items.docs: Triggers a new execution of a pipeline. Allows overriding template parameters, variables, the repository branch, and specifying which stages to skip or include. The run is queued and begins execution when an agent becomes available.

info.name: Azure Pipelines Get a pipeline run

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

params.name: runId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline run

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific pipeline run including its current state, result, template parameters, variables used, and timing information. Use this endpoint to poll for run progress or retrieve final results.

info.name: Azure Pipelines List pipeline run logs

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

params.name: runId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline run

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional log details

items.docs: Returns a list of log entries for a specific pipeline run. Each log entry represents output from a stage, job, or task in the pipeline execution. Use log IDs to retrieve detailed log content.

info.name: Azure Pipelines Get a pipeline run log

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

params.name: runId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline run

params.name: logId
params.description: Numeric ID of the log entry to retrieve

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional log details

items.docs: Returns the content of a specific log from a pipeline run. The log content includes timestamped output from pipeline tasks, stages, and jobs. Useful for debugging failed runs and auditing pipeline execution.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: pipelineId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline definition

params.name: runId
params.description: Numeric ID of the pipeline run

params.name: artifactName
params.description: Filter by a specific artifact name

params.name: $expand
params.description: Expand additional artifact details such as signed content

items.docs: Returns a list of artifacts published by a specific pipeline run. Artifacts include compiled binaries, test results, container images, or any files published using the PublishPipelineArtifact task during pipeline execution.
